rows.label: qev085806_MSG0001
rows.name: Eh! Lao-san came back!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0002
rows.name:
Yeah. We told him the story about
how Elma's team saved us, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0003
rows.name:
He just said "Make sure to thank
them" and that was the end of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0004
rows.name:
Then he just wandered
off somewhere again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0005
rows.name: What a restless person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0006
rows.name: But that's fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0007
rows.name: Lao-san is fine just the way he is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0008
rows.name:
You're right. When I think back to
when we first landed on Mira...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0009
rows.name: What do you mean?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0010
rows.name: Lao-san's abilities as a Pathfinder...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0011
rows.name:
Are highly useful for humanity
settling down here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0012
rows.name:
However, Lao-san himself didn't board the
White Whale to utilize his abilities.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0013
rows.name:
Lao-san wanted to get his wife and
daughter onto the White Whale, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0014
rows.name:
He thought that with his abilities,
he might be able to secure boarding
passes for his family too. But...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0015
rows.name: They couldn't board.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0016
rows.name:
That alien war broke out right before he
could summon his family to the ship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0017
rows.name: [ST:undisp ][ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0018
rows.name:
That is why, when we
first arrived on Mira...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0019
rows.name: Lao-san's soul was essentially dead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0020
rows.name:
Yet lately, it seems he has
found some sort of purpose.
He's been quite energetic.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0021
rows.name: And that makes me happy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0022
rows.name:
But it's really tough on those
of us left behind, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0023
rows.name:
That's why I've told you
time and time again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0024
rows.name:
You just need to become a full-fledged
member and put Lao-san at ease.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0025
rows.name: Y-Yes, sir.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0026
rows.name: You all really love Lao-san, don't you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085806_MSG0027
rows.name:
Lin-san and Tatsu and the rest
of us love Elma-san mo! We are
not losing out to them mo![ST:wait ]
